scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./build/client
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --local --file=migrations/0001_create_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --local --file=migrations/0002_create_subscriptions.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --local --file=migrations/0003_create_organizations.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --local --file=migrations/0004_create_projects.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --local --file=migrations/0005_create_analyses.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --local --file=migrations/0006_create_cli_tokens.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --file=migrations/0001_create_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --file=migrations/0002_create_subscriptions.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --file=migrations/0003_create_organizations.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --file=migrations/0004_create_projects.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --file=migrations/0005_create_analyses.sql && wrangler d1 execute catalyst-db --file=migrations/0006_create_cli_tokens.sql
